title: Chmod flag for add and copy
body:
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read and understood our contributing guidelines
(https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) as well as ensuring
that all your commits are signed with `git commit -s`.
-->

#### What type of PR is this?

/kind feature

#### What this PR does / why we need it:
Adds chmod flag to ADD and COPY
#### How to verify it
Used bats files, but open to suggestions

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:
Fixes #2961

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Yes

```
Support added for --chmod flag to ADD/COPY in Dockerfile
Support added for --chmod flag to buildah cli ADD/COPY
```

comments.body:
@jmguzik: Cannot trigger testing until a trusted user reviews the PR and leaves an `/ok-to-test` message.

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/3004#issuecomment-779120622):

>/retest


Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>

Thanks @jmguzik 

Can you add --chmod to `buildah copy` and `buildah add`?

To complete the change.
@rhatdan yes, that was my intention, but in separate PR. No problem though, I can work on it here.

For info: issue https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/184 is a kind of a blocker. Until it gets resolved this PR won't move further.
buildah copy and build add are implemented, dockerfile handling needs changes in imagebuilder.
@rhatdan probably release of imagebuilder is needed?
Yes I am trying to get one more fix for imagebuilder done, and then we can trigger a release.

@rhatdan @vrothberg this is anything else but not LGTM :)

It is 1/2 of a feature. I will implement today/tomorrow Dockerfile handling (FYI, it works, writing tests today evening).
I can divide it to 2 PRs (doing for this one only buildah cli) or 2 commits (in this PR). 

Right now, this code is handling only cli arguments. Second will be about Dockerfile.

@rhatdan @vrothberg 
If all tests will be OK, then it's ready to be reviewed.

LGTM Except, you need to add these flags to completions. contrib/completions/bash/buildah
@containers/podman-maintainers PTAL
While you are in there, could you also fix the -chown under buildah_add, it is missing a "-"

> While you are in there, could you also fix the -chown under buildah_add, it is missing a "-"

Done

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *jmguzik*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

I think this is still missing from `buildah bud`, with buildah version 1.19.8:

```
STEP 5: COPY --chmod=644 mycorp.crt   usr/local/share/ca-certificates/extra/mycorp.crt
error building at STEP "COPY --chmod=644 mycorp.crt usr/local/share/ca-certificates/extra/mycorp.crt": COPY only supports the --chown=<uid:gid> and the --from=<image|stage> flags
```

EDIT: Building locally from source (915de2e2b50af1ef30808d87e4e715142385b780), this does work as expected, so it should be good on the next release.
